rulings.Case Title: JYOTHSNA TALKAD ET AL VS. 1314 POLK STREET OWNERS ASSOCIATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Contest Good Faith Settlement Application
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 17, 2020 line 1. DEFENDANT DIPALI SHAH's Motion To Contest Good Faith Settlement Application Due to COVID-19 pandemic telephonic appearances are encouraged. If you personally appear for your case notify the department by 5:00 p.m. one day before the hearing at Department501ContestTR@sftc.org. Department will follow social distancing guidelines and you will be required to wear a mask or face covering. By 8:00 a.m. on the date of the hearing parties to submit electronic copies of their respective proposed orders (prevailing party to prepare order in conformity with the tentative ruling in additions to any other proposed orders) in an editable format to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org, so that the judge can modify it prior to signing, if needed. All communications shall include in the subject line the case name, number and hearing date. (e.g. "Smith v. Jones; CGC-18-555555; June 1, 2020"). Defendant Shah's Motion to Contest Good Faith Settlement Application is DENIED. Settlement meets Tech-Bilt factors and the moving party fails to show that the settlement is not made in good faith under the circumstances and facts of this case. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. DERRICK LEE KANE ET AL

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 17, 2020 line 2. DEFENDANT DERRICK KANE's Motion For Leave To File Amended Answer OFF CALENDAR, moot. Amended Answer filed on June 5, 2020. = (501/CFH)
